title: Cotton
description: Cotton Plants in Minecraft! That's it!
body:
## Cotton Mod

### Currently: Working!

#### The Farmers Way Of Obtaining A String? Make A Crop.

Allows to farm for cotton seeds out of normal grass and makes it growable to Cotton plants.

Cotton can be used to make Strings, and Strings for ... well you know ...

- Recipe:
  - One cotton ball equals one string

- Grass drops Cotton Seeds

- Cotton Plant drops Cotton Seeds and Cotton Balls
--------
### If you want to use this in your Modpack, feel free to do so. No Credits needed but it's always appreciated!

Check out the Modpack i made where this mod is in use!
- https://modrinth.com/modpack/the-farm
